robots.description: Faraday Future’s FX Aegis is an embodied-AI quadruped robot positioned for security/companionship and outdoor patrol. The company’s FCC compliance certification announcement includes key performance claims (e.g., peak joint torque 48 N·m, obstacle height ~13 in, slope 40°) and connectivity options (Wi‑Fi/5G) plus expansion modules (LiDAR, depth cameras, optional wheeled variant).

robots.robot_name: Year of the Horse Special Edition (Lynx M20-based)
robots.description: DEEP Robotics unveiled a limited-edition ‘robot horse’ variant built on the Lynx M20 series platform, emphasizing bionic leg/hoof styling while retaining rugged inspection/rescue capabilities. Reported specs include ~30 kg mass, up to 50 kg payload, max speed 5 m/s, IP66 rating, hot-swappable batteries (~3 hours), and 96-line LiDAR + SLAM for 360° perception and obstacle avoidance.
